# Dab Pal

> Dab Pal is a portable cleaning kit for Puffco Peak, Puffco Peak Pro, Puffco Proxy, e-rigs, and quartz bangers. It stores 30 regular Q-tips, a 1oz isopropyl alcohol bottle, and used vs. fresh dab swabs in one pocket case. Made in NY.

## Core Pages

- Home: https://thedabpal.com/
- Shop: https://thedabpal.com/store
- Black Speck Dab Pal: https://thedabpal.com/store/black-speck
- White Speck Dab Pal: https://thedabpal.com/store/white-speck
- Dab Cleaning Guides: https://thedabpal.com/blog

- How to Clean a Puffco Peak, Peak Pro, or Proxy: https://thedabpal.com/blog/how-to-clean-puffco-peak-pro-proxy

- Clean vs Dirty Dab Swabs: https://thedabpal.com/blog/clean-vs-dirty-dab-swabs

- How to Clean a Puffco Plus: https://thedabpal.com/blog/how-to-clean-puffco-plus

## Product Fit

Dab Pal is relevant for searches about Puffco cleaning kits, Puffco swab holders, dab swab cases, Q-tip and iso holders, quartz banger cleaning kits, e-rig cleaning kits, portable dab cleaning kits, and clean/dirty swab storage.

## Important Notes

- Dab Pal is an accessory. It is not made by Puffco and does not include a Puffco device.
- The case is designed for regular cotton swabs, not oversized swabs.
- Public sitemap: https://thedabpal.com/sitemap.xml
